TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-mother_iwan 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ah yaku na eh neyahku jinago yaku neyahku alang tongan gaku meniq ka alang bayke hini na.
S.PHON: aħ jaku na eħ nejaħku jinago jaku nejaħku alaŋ toŋan gaku meniq ka alaŋ bajke ħini na.
S.FORM: ah yaku na eh neyahku jinago yaku neyahku alang tongan gaku meniq ka alang bayke hini na.
S.PHON: aħ jaku na eħ nejaħku jinago jaku nejaħku alaŋ toŋan gaku meniq ka alaŋ bajke ħini na.
S.TRANSL: 我來自仁愛鄉的眉溪部落,而且現在還住在眉溪這裡.
I come from Meixi tribe, Renai village. I'm now still living in Meixi tribe.

S.FORM: ma saya yaku ngayanmu de iwan ku iwan kumu.
S.PHON: ma saja jaku ŋajanmu de iwan ku iwan kumu.
S.FORM: ma saya yaku ngayanmu de iwan ku iwan kumu.
S.PHON: ma saja jaku ŋajanmu de iwan ku iwan kumu.
S.TRANSL: 我的名字叫 Iwan Kumu.
My name is Iwan Kumu.

S.FORM: tama bubu tamabubumu de tamamu de temu pidu ma bubumu de kumu biyugu bubumu ha.
S.PHON: tama bubu tamabubumu de tamamu de temu pidu ma bubumu de kumu bijugu bubumu ħa.
S.FORM: tama bubu tamabubumu de tamamu de temu pidu ma bubumu de kumu biyugu bubumu ha.
S.PHON: tama bubu tamabubumu de tamamu de temu pidu ma bubumu de kumu bijugu bubumu ħa.
S.TRANSL: 至於我的父母呢,父親名叫Temu Pidu,母親名叫Kumu Biyugu.
As for my parents, my father is Temu Pidu, and my mother is Kumu Biyugu.

S.FORM: ma so cbeyo na kana so kana so nodaanna bubumu peni.
S.PHON: ma so ʦbejo na kana so kana so nodaanna bubumu peni.
S.FORM: ma so cbeyo na kana so kana so nodaanna bubumu peni.
S.PHON: ma so ʦbejo na kana so kana so nodaanna bubumu peni.
S.TRANSL: 從前,就是有關我母親的過去.

TRANSL.notes: In the past, (this is) about my mother's past experience.

S.TRANSL: In the past, about my mother's past experience.

S.FORM: eh meniqku gako kokuming gako ciida biciqku ciida iniku kela ani maanu ma.
S.PHON: eħ meniqku gako kokumiŋ gako ʦiida biʦiqku ʦiida iniku kela ani maanu ma.
S.FORM: eh meniqku gako kokuming gako ciida biciqku ciida iniku kela ani maanu ma.
S.PHON: eħ meniqku gako kokumiŋ gako ʦiida biʦiqku ʦiida iniku kela ani maanu ma.
S.TRANSL: 當時,我還在讀國小.因為我還小,什麼事都不懂.
At that time, I was in elementary school, and since I was little, I knew nothing.

S.FORM: bubumu ye ga hmuwa ceka rabi so eh sanji de ga tutui ga mesa kong kong kong ka bubumu ma.
S.PHON: bubumu je ga ħmuwa ʦeka ɾabi so eħ sanji de ga tutui ga mesa koŋ koŋ koŋ ka bubumu ma.
S.FORM: bubumu ye ga hmuwa ceka rabi so eh sanji de ga tutui ga mesa kong kong kong ka bubumu ma.
S.PHON: bubumu je ga ħmuwa ʦeka ɾabi so eħ sanji de ga tutui ga mesa koŋ koŋ koŋ ka bubumu ma.
S.TRANSL: 我的母親,應該是約凌晨三點鐘時,就會起床,並傳來「kong! kong! kong!」的聲音.
And my mother, maybe it was usually three o'clock in the morning, she would get up and make the "kong kong kong" sound.

S.FORM: bubumu ye ga hmuwa ceka rabi so eh sanji de ga tutui ga mesa kong kong kong ka bubumu ma.
S.PHON: bubumu je ga ħmuwa ʦeka ɾabi so eħ sanji de ga tutui ga mesa koŋ koŋ koŋ ka bubumu ma.
S.FORM: bubumu ye ga hmuwa ceka rabi so eh sanji de ga tutui ga mesa kong kong kong ka bubumu ma.
S.PHON: bubumu je ga ħmuwa ʦeka ɾabi so eħ sanji de ga tutui ga mesa koŋ koŋ koŋ ka bubumu ma.
S.TRANSL: 我的母親,應該是約凌晨三點鐘時,就會起床,並傳來「kong! kong! kong!」的聲音.
And my mother, maybe it was usually three o'clock in the morning, she would get up and make the "kong kong kong" sound.

S.FORM: ma osaunmu qmita ma kela naq ga tminun pala ka bubumu.
S.PHON: ma osaunmu qmita ma kela naq ga tminun pala ka bubumu.
S.FORM: ma osaunmu qmita ma kela naq ga tminun pala ka bubumu.
S.PHON: ma osaunmu qmita ma kela naq ga tminun pala ka bubumu.
S.TRANSL: 於是我往前看,原來我母親在織布.
So I looked in the front, to find that my mother was weaving.

S.FORM: ma ga mnuqah duma ka mqedil gaga ssiyona hiya ma.
S.PHON: ma ga mnuqaħ duma ka mqedil gaga ssijona ħija ma.
S.FORM: ma ga mnuqah duma ka mqedil gaga ssiyona hiya ma.
S.PHON: ma ga mnuqaħ duma ka mqedil gaga ssijona ħija ma.
S.TRANSL: 而且還有其他的婦女在我母親的旁邊捻著苧麻絲.

TRANSL.notes: Next to her were (the other) women who were twisting the threads of ramie yarn.

S.TRANSL: Next to her were women who were twisting the threads of ramie yarn.

S.FORM: ma tutui ka bubumu de ga tminun.
S.PHON: ma tutui ka bubumu de ga tminun.
S.FORM: ma tutui ka bubumu de ga tminun.
S.PHON: ma tutui ka bubumu de ga tminun.
S.TRANSL: 我的母親起床了就織布.
My mother weaved when she got up from bed.

S.FORM: ma bsiyaq hari de gaga tminun kana so uyung ma so so deriq so ah ssiyo sapah hii.
S.PHON: ma bsijaq ħaɾi de gaga tminun kana so ujuŋ ma so so deɾiq so aħ ssijo sapaħ ħii.
S.FORM: ma bsiyaq hari de gaga tminun kana so uyung ma so so deriq so ah ssiyo sapah hii.
S.PHON: ma bsijaq ħaɾi de gaga tminun kana so ujuŋ ma so so deɾiq so aħ ssijo sapaħ ħii.

TRANSL.notes: 而且(媽媽起床後)過了不久,住在我們後面的,和隔壁的(女人們)就全部都在織布了.

S.TRANSL: 而且 過了不久,住在我們後面的,和隔壁的 就全部都在織布了.

TRANSL.notes: And not long after (my mother got up), those (women) who lived behind and next to our house were all weaving.

S.TRANSL: And not long after , those who lived behind and next to our house were all weaving.

S.FORM: ma kana mqedil ga mesa kong kong ka keeman sanji di ma.
S.PHON: ma kana mqedil ga mesa koŋ koŋ ka keeman sanji di ma.
S.FORM: ma kana mqedil ga mesa kong kong ka keeman sanji di ma.
S.PHON: ma kana mqedil ga mesa koŋ koŋ ka keeman sanji di ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後所有的婦女都在凌晨三點鐘傳來「kong! kong!」的聲音.
Then all women were making the 'kong kong' sound at three o'clock in the morning.

S.FORM: gisu naq hmuwa rudan nii mesaku ma iniku qemi duri.
S.PHON: gisu naq ħmuwa ɾudan nii mesaku ma iniku qemi duɾi.
S.FORM: gisu naq hmuwa rudan nii mesaku ma iniku qemi duri.
S.PHON: gisu naq ħmuwa ɾudan nii mesaku ma iniku qemi duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 我便心想:「長者們在做什麼呀?」於是就沒有闔眼,睡不著了.
So I thought: "What are these elderly women doing?" I couldn't sleep.

S.FORM: kika tutuiku de musaku musaku siyona bubumu bubu gasu hmuwa mesaku.
S.PHON: kika tutuiku de musaku musaku sijona bubumu bubu gasu ħmuwa mesaku.
S.FORM: kika tutuiku de musaku musaku siyona bubumu bubu gasu hmuwa mesaku.
S.PHON: kika tutuiku de musaku musaku sijona bubumu bubu gasu ħmuwa mesaku.
S.TRANSL: 於是我起床,走到我母親的旁邊,我問:「媽媽,妳在做什麼呀?」
So I got up, went next to my mother, and said: "Mother, what are you doning?"

S.FORM: ma wisu tminun lukus plukusunnamu mesa ka bubu.
S.PHON: ma wisu tminun lukus plukusunnamu mesa ka bubu.
S.FORM: ma wisu tminun lukus plukusunnamu mesa ka bubu.
S.PHON: ma wisu tminun lukus plukusunnamu mesa ka bubu.
S.TRANSL: 我母親這樣說:「我在織衣服,是給你們穿的.」
My mother said, "I'm making clothings. I'm making clothings for you all."

S.FORM: uka lukus sa.
S.PHON: uka lukus sa.
S.FORM: uka lukus sa.
S.PHON: uka lukus sa.
S.TRANSL: 「沒有衣服啦!」她說.
"We're running out of clothes!" she said.

S.FORM: ki mgrebu tutui se egu riyung ka so ooda smalu so pala kana hilo si ma kana so pala ka so plukusunnamu mesa ka bubumu.
S.PHON: ki mgɾebu tutui se egu ɾijuŋ ka so ooda smalu so pala kana ħilo si ma kana so pala ka so plukusunnamu mesa ka bubumu.
S.FORM: ki mgrebu tutui se egu riyung ka so ooda smalu so pala kana hilo si ma kana so pala ka so plukusunnamu mesa ka bubumu.
S.PHON: ki mgɾebu tutui se egu ɾijuŋ ka so ooda smalu so pala kana ħilo si ma kana so pala ka so plukusunnamu mesa ka bubumu.
S.TRANSL: 「我一早就起床,是因為織布的工作很多,像是製作棉被來蓋,和織布來做給你們穿的衣服啦!」我母親這樣說.
"I get up in the morning, because there are so many things to do, such as making quilts, and making the cloths for your clothings" said my mother.

S.FORM: ux mesaku ma ma iniku qemi di tloongku siyo na bubumu.
S.PHON: ux mesaku ma ma iniku qemi di tlooŋku sijo na bubumu.
S.FORM: ux mesaku ma ma iniku qemi di tloongku siyo na bubumu.
S.PHON: ux mesaku ma ma iniku qemi di tlooŋku sijo na bubumu.
S.TRANSL: 我說:「喔!」然後也睡不著了,所以就坐在我母親的旁邊.
I said: "I see!", and could not continue sleeping, so I sat next to my mother.

S.FORM: ga miri a pacang capang ratu paru ka bubumu.
S.PHON: ga miɾi a paʦaŋ ʦapaŋ ɾatu paɾu ka bubumu.
S.FORM: ga miri a pacang capang ratu paru ka bubumu.
S.PHON: ga miɾi a paʦaŋ ʦapaŋ ɾatu paɾu ka bubumu.
S.TRANSL: 我母親正在織大花的粗線布料作床被.
My mother was weaving flower patterns in making large thick quilts.

S.FORM: ma ga peeyah so ah ga peeyah so anu ka so narac e n na narac hini ka bagana bubumu na.
S.PHON: ma ga peejaħ so aħ ga peejaħ so anu ka so naɾaʦ e n na naɾaʦ ħini ka bagana bubumu na.
S.FORM: ma ga peeyah so ah ga peeyah so anu ka so narac e n na narac hini ka bagana bubumu na.
S.PHON: ma ga peejaħ so aħ ga peejaħ so anu ka so naɾaʦ e n na naɾaʦ ħini ka bagana bubumu na.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽的手從右邊這邊

S.FORM: ga peeyah so migi hini ka baga na bubumu gaga mesa miri gaga anu ka moda lmamu so tninun.
S.PHON: ga peejaħ so migi ħini ka baga na bubumu gaga mesa miɾi gaga anu ka moda lmamu so tninun.
S.FORM: ga peeyah so migi hini ka baga na bubumu gaga mesa miri gaga anu ka moda lmamu so tninun.
S.PHON: ga peejaħ so migi ħini ka baga na bubumu gaga mesa miɾi gaga anu ka moda lmamu so tninun.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽的手從右邊這邊開始,以挑花織法挑線,上下穿梭過線條.
My mother's hand moved from her right as she weaved the slower patterns, and passed through the threads upward and downword.

S.FORM: ma mesa ka bubumu eh iwan sluhei tikuh mesa ka bubumu.
S.PHON: ma mesa ka bubumu eħ iwan sluħei tikuħ mesa ka bubumu.
S.FORM: ma mesa ka bubumu eh iwan sluhei tikuh mesa ka bubumu.
S.PHON: ma mesa ka bubumu eħ iwan sluħei tikuħ mesa ka bubumu.
S.TRANSL: 我母親說:「Iwan,來學一下呀!」
"Iwan, come and learn!", said my mother.

S.FORM: masu ini qtaqi sa bubumu.
S.PHON: masu ini qtaqi sa bubumu.
S.FORM: masu ini qtaqi sa bubumu.
S.PHON: masu ini qtaqi sa bubumu.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽問:「你怎麼不睡覺呢?」
My mother asked, "Why don't you sleep?"

S.FORM: un mesaku.
S.PHON: un mesaku.
S.FORM: un mesaku.
S.PHON: un mesaku.
S.TRANSL: 我說:「好啊!」
I said: "OK."

S.FORM: kika manganku begeunkuna kingan ka so budi so ah odaan so lmamu tninun bubumu ma sluheku.
S.PHON: kika maŋanku begeunkuna kiŋan ka so budi so aħ odaan so lmamu tninun bubumu ma sluħeku.
S.FORM: kika manganku begeunkuna kingan ka so budi so ah odaan so lmamu tninun bubumu ma sluheku.
S.PHON: kika maŋanku begeunkuna kiŋan ka so budi so aħ odaan so lmamu tninun bubumu ma sluħeku.
S.TRANSL: 我拿著我母親給我的織布桿.看著媽媽用它上下穿梭於線中,於是我學習著.
So I took the weaving stick that my mother handed to me. As my mother passed her hands up and down through the threads, I learned.

S.FORM: ma peeyahku naq narac yaku ka so ah moda so lmamu ma gaga peeyah so ah migi ka bubumu lmamu tninun msterungmiyan ckceka.
S.PHON: ma peejaħku naq naɾaʦ jaku ka so aħ moda so lmamu ma gaga peejaħ so aħ migi ka bubumu lmamu tninun msteɾuŋmijan ʦkʦeka.
S.FORM: ma peeyahku naq narac yaku ka so ah moda so lmamu ma gaga peeyah so ah migi ka bubumu lmamu tninun msterungmiyan ckceka.
S.PHON: ma peejaħku naq naɾaʦ jaku ka so aħ moda so lmamu ma gaga peejaħ so aħ migi ka bubumu lmamu tninun msteɾuŋmijan ʦkʦeka.

TRANSL.notes: 我就從我的右邊挑織編織,而我母親也正從右邊過來上下穿梭編織著,然後我們在(布匹的)中間相遇.

S.TRANSL: 我就從我的右邊挑織編織,而我母親也正從右邊過來上下穿梭編織著,然後我們在 中間相遇.

TRANSL.notes: I started from the right, and passed through the threads. My mother also started from the right moving up and down across the threads. We came across each other in the middle (of the cloth).

S.TRANSL: I started from the right, and passed through the threads. My mother also started from the right moving up and down across the threads. We came across each other in the middle .

S.FORM: kika wada so wada so biciq ba hari ka odaunna bubumu ma dmayoku tikuh hiya ma.
S.PHON: kika wada so wada so biʦiq ba ħaɾi ka odaunna bubumu ma dmajoku tikuħ ħija ma.
S.FORM: kika wada so wada so biciq ba hari ka odaunna bubumu ma dmayoku tikuh hiya ma.
S.PHON: kika wada so wada so biʦiq ba ħaɾi ka odaunna bubumu ma dmajoku tikuħ ħija ma.
S.TRANSL: 這樣子讓母親要編織的範圍減少了一些.我也幫了一點忙!
In this way, the area on the cloth that she had to go though became less. I helped a little!

S.FORM: kika peeyahku ciida de eniqan tikuh lngelunganmu mesa oh kela naq so so kiya bubuta ma mbqerus riyung tminun keeman musa meepah diyan duri mesaku ma.
S.PHON: kika peejaħku ʦiida de eniqan tikuħ lŋeluŋanmu mesa oħ kela naq so so kija bubuta ma mbqeɾus ɾijuŋ tminun keeman musa meepaħ dijan duɾi mesaku ma.
S.FORM: kika peeyahku ciida de eniqan tikuh lngelunganmu mesa oh kela naq so so kiya bubuta ma mbqerus riyung tminun keeman musa meepah diyan duri mesaku ma.
S.PHON: kika peejaħku ʦiida de eniqan tikuħ lŋeluŋanmu mesa oħ kela naq so so kija bubuta ma mbqeɾus ɾijuŋ tminun keeman musa meepaħ dijan duɾi mesaku ma.
S.TRANSL: 從那時候起,我心裡稍稍有這樣的想法,原來我的母親是這樣辛苦.我想:「尚未天亮就要織布,白天又要去工作.」
Because of this, I started to realize that our mother was so hard working. She weaves before dawn, and goes to work during the day, I thought.

S.FORM: maha mapa kana waso bunga bbiyan meyah tmabu babuy tmabu rodux meyah mahu lukus keeman mesaku ma.
S.PHON: maħa mapa kana waso buŋa bbijan mejaħ tmabu babuj tmabu ɾodux mejaħ maħu lukus keeman mesaku ma.
S.FORM: maha mapa kana waso bunga bbiyan meyah tmabu babuy tmabu rodux meyah mahu lukus keeman mesaku ma.
S.PHON: maħa mapa kana waso buŋa bbijan mejaħ tmabu babuj tmabu ɾodux mejaħ maħu lukus keeman mesaku ma.
S.TRANSL: 「然後,黃昏又揹著地瓜葉回來養豬養雞,晚上回來還洗衣服.」我這樣想.
"She carries back all the yam leaves in the evening, coming home to feed the bips and the chickens, and she does the laudary at night" I thought

S.FORM: kika qitaanmu so bubumu kana so atamu kana so tamamu ma eh qbsuranmu.
S.PHON: kika qitaanmu so bubumu kana so atamu kana so tamamu ma eħ qbsuɾanmu.
S.FORM: kika qitaanmu so bubumu kana so atamu kana so tamamu ma eh qbsuranmu.
S.PHON: kika qitaanmu so bubumu kana so atamu kana so tamamu ma eħ qbsuɾanmu.
S.TRANSL: 我看到我的母親,我的嫂嫂們,我的父親,以及我的兄姊們.
I saw my mother, my sisters in law, my father, and my older siblings.

S.FORM: ma ma ma anu ka so ah ah mbqerus riyung ka so ah.
S.PHON: ma ma ma anu ka so aħ aħ mbqeɾus ɾijuŋ ka so aħ.
S.FORM: ma ma ma anu ka so ah ah mbqerus riyung ka so ah.
S.PHON: ma ma ma anu ka so aħ aħ mbqeɾus ɾijuŋ ka so aħ.
S.TRANSL: 所以,我看著我的母親,和像是我的嫂嫂、我的父親和我的兄姊,全部的人都這麼辛勞的工作.
So I saw my mother, my sister-in-law, my father, and my older brothers and sisters. All of them worked so hard.

S.FORM: nodaan cbeyo mesaku nodaan saya mesaku ma kika mlume m lmngelungku di.
S.PHON: nodaan ʦbejo mesaku nodaan saja mesaku ma kika mlume m lmŋeluŋku di.
S.FORM: nodaan cbeyo mesaku nodaan saya mesaku ma kika mlume m lmngelungku di.
S.PHON: nodaan ʦbejo mesaku nodaan saja mesaku ma kika mlume m lmŋeluŋku di.
S.TRANSL: 以前的生活是比現在還要困苦許多.我是這麼想的.
Life in the past was much harsher than life in the present. This is what I thought.

S.FORM: kika secugiyoku kokuming gako de kika mesa ka bubumu iwan s meniq ka rudan cbeyo de uka kesun rudan cbeyo mesa usa usa sluhe smais anu ka skagulundaha smais ka laqidaha.
S.PHON: kika seʦugijoku kokumiŋ gako de kika mesa ka bubumu iwan s meniq ka ɾudan ʦbejo de uka kesun ɾudan ʦbejo mesa usa usa sluħe smais anu ka skagulundaħa smais ka laqidaħa.
S.FORM: kika secugiyoku kokuming gako de kika mesa ka bubumu iwan s meniq ka rudan cbeyo de uka kesun rudan cbeyo mesa usa usa sluhe smais anu ka skagulundaha smais ka laqidaha.
S.PHON: kika seʦugijoku kokumiŋ gako de kika mesa ka bubumu iwan s meniq ka ɾudan ʦbejo de uka kesun ɾudan ʦbejo mesa usa usa sluħe smais anu ka skagulundaħa smais ka laqidaħa.
S.TRANSL: 我國小畢業以後,我母親對我說:「Iwan,以前的長者呀,都不會說『去學裁縫!』然後吩咐小孩去做裁縫.」
After I graduated from elementary school, my mother told me: "Listen, Iwan. The elderly people in the past wouldn't say 'Go learn dressmaking!' and send their kids to learn dressmaking."

S.FORM: ano meepah kelaundaha rudan cbeyo ma mapa bruru ma musa so mapa qhuni.
S.PHON: ano meepaħ kelaundaħa ɾudan ʦbejo ma mapa bɾuɾu ma musa so mapa qħuni.
S.FORM: ano meepah kelaundaha rudan cbeyo ma mapa bruru ma musa so mapa qhuni.
S.PHON: ano meepaħ kelaundaħa ɾudan ʦbejo ma mapa bɾuɾu ma musa so mapa qħuni.
S.TRANSL: 以前的長者,只知道工作、揹籃子、揹木材.
The elderly people in the past, they only knew about working and carrying baskets and woods.

S.FORM: ma bubumu de malu tunuxna bubumu mesa hiya iwan sa ah secugiyosu kokuming gako de usa nogio gako usa sluhe tikuh anu ka smais lukus kesaunkuna.
S.PHON: ma bubumu de malu tunuxna bubumu mesa ħija iwan sa aħ seʦugijosu kokumiŋ gako de usa nogio gako usa sluħe tikuħ anu ka smais lukus kesaunkuna.
S.FORM: ma bubumu de malu tunuxna bubumu mesa hiya iwan sa ah secugiyosu kokuming gako de usa nogio gako usa sluhe tikuh anu ka smais lukus kesaunkuna.
S.PHON: ma bubumu de malu tunuxna bubumu mesa ħija iwan sa aħ seʦugijosu kokumiŋ gako de usa nogio gako usa sluħe tikuħ anu ka smais lukus kesaunkuna.
S.TRANSL: 而我的母親呢,她真的很聰明.她說:「Iwan,你國小畢業了,就去霧社農業學校學一些裁縫吧!」
But my mother, she was so brilliant. "Iwan, you have graduated from elementary school. Go to the Wushe Agriculture School and learn how to do dressmaking!" she said.

S.FORM: ma muqi malu tunux ka rudan kiya.
S.PHON: ma muqi malu tunux ka ɾudan kija.
S.FORM: ma muqi malu tunux ka rudan kiya.
S.PHON: ma muqi malu tunux ka ɾudan kija.
S.TRANSL: 這位老人家真是聰明.
This old lady is indeed very brilliant.

S.FORM: ma rudan cbeyo uka so kii kana mesa hii ah secugiyo de iya usa me iya usa smais iya usa muuyas sa mangalsu laqi mahata meepah mesa ka rudan cbeyo.
S.PHON: ma ɾudan ʦbejo uka so kii kana mesa ħii aħ seʦugijo de ija usa me ija usa smais ija usa muujas sa maŋalsu laqi maħata meepaħ mesa ka ɾudan ʦbejo.
S.FORM: ma rudan cbeyo uka so kii kana mesa hii ah secugiyo de iya usa me iya usa smais iya usa muuyas sa mangalsu laqi mahata meepah mesa ka rudan cbeyo.
S.PHON: ma ɾudan ʦbejo uka so kii kana mesa ħii aħ seʦugijo de ija usa me ija usa smais ija usa muujas sa maŋalsu laqi maħata meepaħ mesa ka ɾudan ʦbejo.
S.TRANSL: 以前的長輩不會像這樣.他們會說:「畢業之後,不要學裁縫,不要去上學.」長者們會說:「你要照顧小孩,我們要去耕作.」

The elderly people in the past wouldn't be like this. They would say "After graduation, don't do dressmaking, don't keep on studying." "You will take care of the other kids at home. We will go working" they'd say.

S.FORM: ini so kiya bubumaku mbeyax bale so ah so smeelu odamu.
S.PHON: ini so kija bubumaku mbejax bale so aħ so smeelu odamu.
S.FORM: ini so kiya bubumaku mbeyax bale so ah so smeelu odamu.
S.PHON: ini so kija bubumaku mbejax bale so aħ so smeelu odamu.
S.TRANSL: 而我母親卻不是這樣的,她努力地引導我往前走.
But my mother was not like that. She tried her best to lead me.

S.FORM: usa muuyas nogiyo gako paran sa usa sluhe ah smais kesaunkuna ma.
S.PHON: usa muujas nogijo gako paɾan sa usa sluħe aħ smais kesaunkuna ma.
S.FORM: usa muuyas nogiyo gako paran sa usa sluhe ah smais kesaunkuna ma.
S.PHON: usa muujas nogijo gako paɾan sa usa sluħe aħ smais kesaunkuna ma.
S.TRANSL: 她告訴我:「去霧社農校讀書並學縫紉.」
She told me: "Go to Wushe Agriculture School and learn dressmaking."

S.FORM: ma un kesaunmu ma.
S.PHON: ma un kesaunmu ma.
S.FORM: ma un kesaunmu ma.
S.PHON: ma un kesaunmu ma.
S.TRANSL: 我說:「好的」.
I said, "Yes."

S.FORM: kika rokagecuku mhedu smais muuyas ah ah paran de meyahku sapah di.
S.PHON: kika ɾokageʦuku mħedu smais muujas aħ aħ paɾan de mejaħku sapaħ di.
S.FORM: kika rokagecuku mhedu smais muuyas ah ah paran de meyahku sapah di.
S.PHON: kika ɾokageʦuku mħedu smais muujas aħ aħ paɾan de mejaħku sapaħ di.
S.TRANSL: 所以在霧社上學學習縫紉六個月後,我就回家了.
So after learning dressmaking in Wushe for six months, I went back home.

S.FORM: ma kesaunkuna du iwan s ini usa ini baka snluheansu na usa anu ka sluhe anu ka yosai hori smais lukus dungan kesaunkuna.
S.PHON: ma kesaunkuna du iwan s ini usa ini baka snluħeansu na usa anu ka sluħe anu ka josai ħoɾi smais lukus duŋan kesaunkuna.
S.FORM: ma kesaunkuna du iwan s ini usa ini baka snluheansu na usa anu ka sluhe anu ka yosai hori smais lukus dungan kesaunkuna.
S.PHON: ma kesaunkuna du iwan s ini usa ini baka snluħeansu na usa anu ka sluħe anu ka josai ħoɾi smais lukus duŋan kesaunkuna.
S.TRANSL: 我母親又對我說:「Iwan,你學的還不夠,你再去埔里學洋裁,裁縫衣服.」
And she told me: "Iwan, what you've learned is not enough yet. Go to Puli to learn western dressmaking and make clothings."

S.FORM: ma kika musaku sluhe hori dungan ma kelaku hari smais di.
S.PHON: ma kika musaku sluħe ħoɾi duŋan ma kelaku ħaɾi smais di.
S.FORM: ma kika musaku sluhe hori dungan ma kelaku hari smais di.
S.PHON: ma kika musaku sluħe ħoɾi duŋan ma kelaku ħaɾi smais di.
S.TRANSL: 所以我又到埔里學習,又學會了一些裁縫技巧了.
So I went to Puli to learn more. Then I got to know a little more about dressmaking.

S.FORM: ma kika secugiyonami hori hbaro ba ka tnhiqanmu ka mukan uri ma seediq ka hori hii ma.
S.PHON: ma kika seʦugijonami ħoɾi ħbaɾo ba ka tnħiqanmu ka mukan uɾi ma seediq ka ħoɾi ħii ma.
S.FORM: ma kika secugiyonami hori hbaro ba ka tnhiqanmu ka mukan uri ma seediq ka hori hii ma.
S.PHON: ma kika seʦugijonami ħoɾi ħbaɾo ba ka tnħiqanmu ka mukan uɾi ma seediq ka ħoɾi ħii ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們在埔里畢業時,有很多的同學,有閩南人,也有賽德克族人.
When we graduated in Puli, we had many classmates. There were the Southern Min people and also the Seediq people.

S.FORM: meyahku sapah di kika so haykju so ah tensukjo so lukus kana lukus ah paru biciq adisundaha sapahmu.
S.PHON: mejaħku sapaħ di kika so ħajkju so aħ tensukjo so lukus kana lukus aħ paɾu biʦiq adisundaħa sapaħmu.
S.FORM: meyahku sapah di kika so haykju so ah tensukjo so lukus kana lukus ah paru biciq adisundaha sapahmu.
S.PHON: mejaħku sapaħ di kika so ħajkju so aħ tensukjo so lukus kana lukus aħ paɾu biʦiq adisundaħa sapaħmu.
S.TRANSL: 我回到家後,像是天主教的配給品衣物,大大小小他們都帶到我家裡來了.
As I came home, all the clothes that the church allocated to the tribe, the large ones and the small ones, were brought by people to my house.

S.FORM: kela smais iwan kumu sa hata mege hii kana ka li lukus ah so paru ah lukus ah dame nii hata kayjyo hiya.
S.PHON: kela smais iwan kumu sa ħata mege ħii kana ka li lukus aħ so paɾu aħ lukus aħ dame nii ħata kajjjo ħija.
S.FORM: kela smais iwan kumu sa hata mege hii kana ka li lukus ah so paru ah lukus ah dame nii hata kayjyo hiya.
S.PHON: kela smais iwan kumu sa ħata mege ħii kana ka li lukus aħ so paɾu aħ lukus aħ dame nii ħata kajjjo ħija.
S.TRANSL: 他們說:「Iwan Kumu會做裁縫.這些大件的外國人衣服我們都拿給他修改吧!」
They said: "Iwan Kumu can do dressmaking. Let's bring her all the clothes, the large ones given by the foreigners, and have them busheled!

S.FORM: ma kika adisundaha kana lukusdaha.
S.PHON: ma kika adisundaħa kana lukusdaħa.
S.FORM: ma kika adisundaha kana lukusdaha.
S.PHON: ma kika adisundaħa kana lukusdaħa.
S.TRANSL: 他們於是帶著他們的衣服來了.
Therefore, they brought all their clothes to me.

S.FORM: knkingan lukus na wadamu kayjyo de gocugen angalunmu ciida ma.
S.PHON: knkiŋan lukus na wadamu kajjjo de goʦugen aŋalunmu ʦiida ma.
S.FORM: knkingan lukus na wadamu kayjyo de gocugen angalunmu ciida ma.
S.PHON: knkiŋan lukus na wadamu kajjjo de goʦugen aŋalunmu ʦiida ma.
S.TRANSL: 我一件一件的修改.當時修改一件我收50元.
One after another, I busheled the clothes, and was paid fifty dollars for each piece.

S.FORM: kesaunta gocugen ciida ge paru riyung pila ka ciida ma.
S.PHON: kesaunta goʦugen ʦiida ge paɾu ɾijuŋ pila ka ʦiida ma.
S.FORM: kesaunta gocugen ciida ge paru riyung pila ka ciida ma.
S.PHON: kesaunta goʦugen ʦiida ge paɾu ɾijuŋ pila ka ʦiida ma.
S.TRANSL: 當時我們說五十元是蠻大的數字.
At that time, fifty dollars was quite a lot of money to us.

S.FORM: qaras riyung ka bubumu maku malu riyung ppuyasku isu sa eN eniqan oh ah eniqan dungus na kiya mesa bubumu.
S.PHON: qaɾas ɾijuŋ ka bubumu maku malu ɾijuŋ ppujasku isu sa en eniqan oħ aħ eniqan duŋus na kija mesa bubumu.
S.FORM: qaras riyung ka bubumu maku malu riyung ppuyasku isu sa eN eniqan oh ah eniqan dungus na kiya mesa bubumu.
S.PHON: qaɾas ɾijuŋ ka bubumu maku malu ɾijuŋ ppujasku isu sa en eniqan oħ aħ eniqan duŋus na kija mesa bubumu.
S.TRANSL: 我的母親非常高興,她說:「我讓你去讀書真是太好了,真是有價值!」
My mother was very happy and she said, "It's good that I made you study. It's a valuable thing!" she said.

S.FORM: ma kika musaku seno di ma kika eniqan naq ka so pnsokay ah senomu kiya ma musaku telu ma.
S.PHON: ma kika musaku seno di ma kika eniqan naq ka so pnsokaj aħ senomu kija ma musaku telu ma.
S.FORM: ma kika musaku seno di ma kika eniqan naq ka so pnsokay ah senomu kiya ma musaku telu ma.
S.PHON: ma kika musaku seno di ma kika eniqan naq ka so pnsokaj aħ senomu kija ma musaku telu ma.
S.TRANSL: 所以我透過仲介,嫁給了外省人.
So via a matchmaker, I married to a Chinese person.

S.FORM: bu berihku alang dungan meyahku ah smiling bubumu bubu mesaku huwa mesa tminun tgesaiku tminun ha kesaunmu.
S.PHON: bu beɾiħku alaŋ duŋan mejaħku aħ smiliŋ bubumu bubu mesaku ħuwa mesa tminun tgesaiku tminun ħa kesaunmu.
S.FORM: bu berihku alang dungan meyahku ah smiling bubumu bubu mesaku huwa mesa tminun tgesaiku tminun ha kesaunmu.
S.PHON: bu beɾiħku alaŋ duŋan mejaħku aħ smiliŋ bubumu bubu mesaku ħuwa mesa tminun tgesaiku tminun ħa kesaunmu.
S.TRANSL: 然後我回到部落,再次請教我的母親.我說:「母親,教我如何織布吧!」
Then I returned to the tribe, asking my mother again about weaving. "Mother," I said, "please teach me how to weave!"

S.FORM: ciida de tenaku so cugosay curokusay hari du ma.
S.PHON: ʦiida de tenaku so ʦugosaj ʦuɾokusaj ħaɾi du ma.
S.FORM: ciida de tenaku so cugosay curokusay hari du ma.
S.PHON: ʦiida de tenaku so ʦugosaj ʦuɾokusaj ħaɾi du ma.
S.TRANSL: 當時我已經約十五、六歲了.
At that time, I was about fifteen or sixteen years old.

S.FORM: su eh tgesaiku tikuh tminun kesaun bubumu ma tgesaunkuna.
S.PHON: su eħ tgesaiku tikuħ tminun kesaun bubumu ma tgesaunkuna.
S.FORM: su eh tgesaiku tikuh tminun kesaun bubumu ma tgesaunkuna.
S.PHON: su eħ tgesaiku tikuħ tminun kesaun bubumu ma tgesaunkuna.
S.TRANSL: 我對著我的母親說:「請妳教我織布吧!」而她也教了我.
"Please teach me a little about weaving!" I said to her. So she taught me.

S.FORM: ma me peeyah ciida ka meyah ka lngelunganmu so so gisumu qeepahun saya du ma.
S.PHON: ma me peejaħ ʦiida ka mejaħ ka lŋeluŋanmu so so gisumu qeepaħun saja du ma.
S.FORM: ma me peeyah ciida ka meyah ka lngelunganmu so so gisumu qeepahun saya du ma.
S.PHON: ma me peejaħ ʦiida ka mejaħ ka lŋeluŋanmu so so gisumu qeepaħun saja du ma.
S.TRANSL: 從那時候起,我對現在所從事的工作就有了想法.
It was at that time that I started to have the aspiration for what I'm doing for work now.

S.FORM: kana so keguy nii hanmu mangan seediq kana keguy.
S.PHON: kana so keguj nii ħanmu maŋan seediq kana keguj.
S.FORM: kana so keguy nii hanmu mangan seediq kana keguy.
S.PHON: kana so keguj nii ħanmu maŋan seediq kana keguj.

TRANSL.notes: 連苧麻呢,我全部是向別人要(種子).

S.TRANSL: 連苧麻呢,我全部是向別人要 .

TRANSL.notes: All the ramies (used for weaving) were (grown) from (the seeds given by) other people.

S.TRANSL: All the ramies were from other people.

S.FORM: slaaleku mhuma keguy han ma kika nuq ah qmnuqahku di ma so tmgiya kana so dmgese so tminun di.
S.PHON: slaaleku mħuma keguj ħan ma kika nuq aħ qmnuqaħku di ma so tmgija kana so dmgese so tminun di.
S.FORM: slaaleku mhuma keguy han ma kika nuq ah qmnuqahku di ma so tmgiya kana so dmgese so tminun di.
S.PHON: slaaleku mħuma keguj ħan ma kika nuq aħ qmnuqaħku di ma so tmgija kana so dmgese so tminun di.
S.TRANSL: 我先種植苧麻,接著我捻絲、轉軸、繞線、織布等.
I grew ramie first, and then I twisted the threads, rolled them, coiled them, and then weaved.

S.FORM: kika m meyah naq kana lnlunganmu du ma.
S.PHON: kika m mejaħ naq kana lnluŋanmu du ma.
S.FORM: kika m meyah naq kana lnlunganmu du ma.
S.PHON: kika m mejaħ naq kana lnluŋanmu du ma.

TRANSL.notes: 就因為這樣,我所有的心(興趣)都上來了.

S.TRANSL: 就因為這樣,我所有的心 都上來了.

TRANSL.notes: Because of this, all my interests (in weaving) were aroused.

S.TRANSL: Because of this, all my interests were aroused.

S.FORM: betaq saya ge mahaku bale yonjunen hari smalu kana so lukus ah lukus seediq so lukusta ita so tgdaya di peni ma.
S.PHON: betaq saja ge maħaku bale jonjunen ħaɾi smalu kana so lukus aħ lukus seediq so lukusta ita so tgdaja di peni ma.
S.FORM: betaq saya ge mahaku bale yonjunen hari smalu kana so lukus ah lukus seediq so lukusta ita so tgdaya di peni ma.
S.PHON: betaq saja ge maħaku bale jonjunen ħaɾi smalu kana so lukus aħ lukus seediq so lukusta ita so tgdaja di peni ma.
S.TRANSL: 我製作各種衣服已經有四十年了,像我們德固達雅的傳統服裝.
I've been making all kinds of clothings for about forty years, including our traditional clothings of the Tgdaya people.

S.FORM: ncuinku tminun duri ncuinku musa maruy tikuh so kasimirong so tninun mukan duri ma kika matak matakku lukus ma.
S.PHON: nʦuinku tminun duɾi nʦuinku musa maɾuj tikuħ so kasimiɾoŋ so tninun mukan duɾi ma kika matak matakku lukus ma.
S.FORM: ncuinku tminun duri ncuinku musa maruy tikuh so kasimirong so tninun mukan duri ma kika matak matakku lukus ma.
S.PHON: nʦuinku tminun duɾi nʦuinku musa maɾuj tikuħ so kasimiɾoŋ so tninun mukan duɾi ma kika matak matakku lukus ma.
S.TRANSL: 有時我織布,會去買一些尼龍線,用閩南人的織法,來剪裁縫製衣服.
Sometimes I would buy nylon threads for weaving, and I would use the Southern Min techniques to cut and make clothes.

S.FORM: nasi uxe tikuh kiya ka so wadamu gamu so cikau tikuh so dmayo tikuh so senomu so dmanga laqi.
S.PHON: nasi uxe tikuħ kija ka so wadamu gamu so ʦikau tikuħ so dmajo tikuħ so senomu so dmaŋa laqi.
S.FORM: nasi uxe tikuh kiya ka so wadamu gamu so cikau tikuh so dmayo tikuh so senomu so dmanga laqi.
S.PHON: nasi uxe tikuħ kija ka so wadamu gamu so ʦikau tikuħ so dmajo tikuħ so senomu so dmaŋa laqi.

TRANSL.notes: 如果不是那樣一點(織布賺來的錢),我就很難幫助先生撫養孩子.

S.TRANSL: 如果不是那樣一點 ,我就很難幫助先生撫養孩子.

TRANSL.notes: If it hadn't been that (little amount of money earned by weaving), it would have been a little tougher for me to help my husband raise our children.

S.TRANSL: If it hadn't been that , it would have been a little tougher for me to help my husband raise our children.

S.FORM: eN biciq bale ka hokjuna senomu duri ma.
S.PHON: en biʦiq bale ka ħokjuna senomu duɾi ma.
S.FORM: eN biciq bale ka hokjuna senomu duri ma.
S.PHON: en biʦiq bale ka ħokjuna senomu duɾi ma.
S.TRANSL: 那時候我先生的薪資也很微薄.
My husband also earned very little at that time.

S.FORM: nasi uxe tikuh yaku dmayo uri ge m naka mhuwa ka so nodaanmi yami du ma.
S.PHON: nasi uxe tikuħ jaku dmajo uɾi ge m naka mħuwa ka so nodaanmi jami du ma.
S.FORM: nasi uxe tikuh yaku dmayo uri ge m naka mhuwa ka so nodaanmi yami du ma.
S.PHON: nasi uxe tikuħ jaku dmajo uɾi ge m naka mħuwa ka so nodaanmi jami du ma.
S.TRANSL: 如果我沒有多幫忙一點的話,不知道我們當時會如何度過?
If I hadn't helped a little, how would we have passed through the hard time?

S.FORM: kika betaqku saya rudanku saya di.
S.PHON: kika betaqku saja ɾudanku saja di.
S.FORM: kika betaqku saya rudanku saya di.
S.PHON: kika betaqku saja ɾudanku saja di.
S.TRANSL: 現在,我已經老了.
Now, I am already old.

S.FORM: peeyahku cu gosay culokusay sluhe bubumu saya de rokucu haciku saya di rudanku qudi kana tunuxmu di.
S.PHON: peejaħku ʦu gosaj ʦulokusaj sluħe bubumu saja de ɾokuʦu ħaʦiku saja di ɾudanku qudi kana tunuxmu di.
S.FORM: peeyahku cu gosay culokusay sluhe bubumu saya de rokucu haciku saya di rudanku qudi kana tunuxmu di.
S.PHON: peejaħku ʦu gosaj ʦulokusaj sluħe bubumu saja de ɾokuʦu ħaʦiku saja di ɾudanku qudi kana tunuxmu di.

TRANSL.notes: 我從十六歲開始便向我母親學習(織布),到現在已經六十八歲了.我已經是個頭髮斑白的老年人了.

S.TRANSL: 我從十六歲開始便向我母親學習 ,到現在已經六十八歲了.我已經是個頭髮斑白的老年人了.

TRANSL.notes: I had learned (the art of weaving) from my mother since I was sixteen years old, and now, I am already sixty-eight years old. I am old now, with my hair all becoming white.

S.TRANSL: I had learned from my mother since I was sixteen years old, and now, I am already sixty-eight years old. I am old now, with my hair all becoming white.

S.FORM: ma egu riyung ka kana sa so gokgoso ma so gensehu na gaga so dmayo bale ka so so seediq yuanzhumin yuanzhumin.
S.PHON: ma egu ɾijuŋ ka kana sa so gokgoso ma so genseħu na gaga so dmajo bale ka so so seediq juan*ħumin juan*ħumin.
S.FORM: ma egu riyung ka kana sa so gokgoso ma so gensehu na gaga so dmayo bale ka so so seediq yuanzhumin yuanzhumin.
S.PHON: ma egu ɾijuŋ ka kana sa so gokgoso ma so genseħu na gaga so dmajo bale ka so so seediq juan*ħumin juan*ħumin.
S.TRANSL: 然後很多政府單位,像是鄉公所、縣政府等,都在幫忙原住民.
Many government authorities concerned, such as the Township Office and the County Government, are offering a lot of help to the aborigines.

S.FORM: mesa eN tutui kana so nodaan rudan cbeyo mesa hiya kana so tmlenga ma so tminun di kana so mhuma ma tutui kana kiya sa.
S.PHON: mesa en tutui kana so nodaan ɾudan ʦbejo mesa ħija kana so tmleŋa ma so tminun di kana so mħuma ma tutui kana kija sa.
S.FORM: mesa eN tutui kana so nodaan rudan cbeyo mesa hiya kana so tmlenga ma so tminun di kana so mhuma ma tutui kana kiya sa.
S.PHON: mesa en tutui kana so nodaan ɾudan ʦbejo mesa ħija kana so tmleŋa ma so tminun di kana so mħuma ma tutui kana kija sa.
S.TRANSL: 都說「起來!發揚祖先的精神!要振興我們像陷獵、織布、種植等文化.」
They said:"Revitalize your traditions! Revitalize the cultures of trap-hunting, weaving, and plant-growing."

S.FORM: gokgoso gisu so tmutuy dmayo uri na.
S.PHON: gokgoso gisu so tmutuj dmajo uɾi na.
S.FORM: gokgoso gisu so tmutuy dmayo uri na.
S.PHON: gokgoso gisu so tmutuj dmajo uɾi na.

TRANSL.notes: 鄉公所也如此大力推動(復興運動).

S.TRANSL: 鄉公所也如此大力推動 .

TRANSL.notes: The Township Office is also pushing forward (all the revitalization programs).

S.TRANSL: The Township Office is also pushing forward .

S.FORM: ma kika kika eniqan nanaq so so daigako duri moda sapah he moda rmigo tikuh so tminunku ma so eniqan naq so ooda so tminun so smais.
S.PHON: ma kika kika eniqan nanaq so so daigako duɾi moda sapaħ ħe moda ɾmigo tikuħ so tminunku ma so eniqan naq so ooda so tminun so smais.
S.FORM: ma kika kika eniqan nanaq so so daigako duri moda sapah he moda rmigo tikuh so tminunku ma so eniqan naq so ooda so tminun so smais.
S.PHON: ma kika kika eniqan nanaq so so daigako duɾi moda sapaħ ħe moda ɾmigo tikuħ so tminunku ma so eniqan naq so ooda so tminun so smais.

TRANSL.notes: 另外,也有像大學(生)來我家,了解一些有關我的織布技巧、過程、和一些縫製的技巧等.

S.TRANSL: 另外,也有像大學 來我家,了解一些有關我的織布技巧、過程、和一些縫製的技巧等.

TRANSL.notes: Also, some university (students) came to my house to know something about my weaving techniques, the processes involved, and some sweing techiniques.

S.TRANSL: Also, some university came to my house to know something about my weaving techniques, the processes involved, and some sweing techiniques.

S.FORM: egu bale riyung ka snalumu ga sapah hii duri ma ma eniqan naq moda maruy de maruy seediq ma.
S.PHON: egu bale ɾijuŋ ka snalumu ga sapaħ ħii duɾi ma ma eniqan naq moda maɾuj de maɾuj seediq ma.
S.FORM: egu bale riyung ka snalumu ga sapah hii duri ma ma eniqan naq moda maruy de maruy seediq ma.
S.PHON: egu bale ɾijuŋ ka snalumu ga sapaħ ħii duɾi ma ma eniqan naq moda maɾuj de maɾuj seediq ma.

TRANSL.notes: 我在家也有(擺設了)很多我的作品,有人們經過的話,也都會購買.

S.TRANSL: 我在家也有 很多我的作品,有人們經過的話,也都會購買.

TRANSL.notes: Many of my works are (displayed) in my house, too, and when people pass by, they would buy them.

S.TRANSL: Many of my works are in my house, too, and when people pass by, they would buy them.

S.FORM: kika anta naq so ah meniq naq hii ka duma ma hbaro ba ka moda ka so seediq ma so mukan ma qmita kuxundaha de maruy di.
S.PHON: kika anta naq so aħ meniq naq ħii ka duma ma ħbaɾo ba ka moda ka so seediq ma so mukan ma qmita kuxundaħa de maɾuj di.
S.FORM: kika anta naq so ah meniq naq hii ka duma ma hbaro ba ka moda ka so seediq ma so mukan ma qmita kuxundaha de maruy di.
S.PHON: kika anta naq so aħ meniq naq ħii ka duma ma ħbaɾo ba ka moda ka so seediq ma so mukan ma qmita kuxundaħa de maɾuj di.
S.TRANSL: 就算有些人只是來逗留看看而已,也有很多的族人和閩南人,如果看了喜歡,就會買.
Even though some people are just looking, there are still many people, including Seediq and Southern Min ones, who would buy if they like the works after looking.

S.FORM: ma saya de saya de kika ima ka sense ah sense anu ka neyah so daygako nii kana so da aking nii huang huangmeiyu laoshi hoN uN ma kana sense ka daygako mukan.
S.PHON: ma saja de saja de kika ima ka sense aħ sense anu ka nejaħ so dajgako nii kana so da akiŋ nii ħuaŋ ħuaŋmeiju laosħi ħon un ma kana sense ka dajgako mukan.
S.FORM: ma saya de saya de kika ima ka sense ah sense anu ka neyah so daygako nii kana so da aking nii huang huangmeiyu laoshi hoN uN ma kana sense ka daygako mukan.
S.PHON: ma saja de saja de kika ima ka sense aħ sense anu ka nejaħ so dajgako nii kana so da akiŋ nii ħuaŋ ħuaŋmeiju laosħi ħon un ma kana sense ka dajgako mukan.
S.TRANSL: 現在,這裡有從大學來的閩南籍的老師,還有黃美玉老師.
Today here we have the university professor of Southern Min origin, and also teacher Meiyu Huang.

S.FORM: ma mesa hii anu ka posai tikuh so rengoi tikuh ka nodaansu cbeyo mesa hiya.
S.PHON: ma mesa ħii anu ka posai tikuħ so ɾeŋoi tikuħ ka nodaansu ʦbejo mesa ħija.
S.FORM: ma mesa hii anu ka posai tikuh so rengoi tikuh ka nodaansu cbeyo mesa hiya.
S.PHON: ma mesa ħii anu ka posai tikuħ so ɾeŋoi tikuħ ka nodaansu ʦbejo mesa ħija.
S.TRANSL: 然後老師們對我說:「說一些你以前的經歷故事啊!」
Then they said to me: "Tell us a little bit about your past experience."

S.FORM: ma kika un mesaku.
S.PHON: ma kika un mesaku.
S.FORM: ma kika un mesaku.
S.PHON: ma kika un mesaku.
S.TRANSL: 我就說:「好啊!」
Then I said "Sure!"

S.FORM: lngelungunmu bubumu na so nodaanmu cbeyo.
S.PHON: lŋeluŋunmu bubumu na so nodaanmu ʦbejo.
S.FORM: lngelungunmu bubumu na so nodaanmu cbeyo.
S.PHON: lŋeluŋunmu bubumu na so nodaanmu ʦbejo.
S.TRANSL: 我就想起了我的母親,想起我過去的經歷.
I then thought of my mother, and my past experience.

S.FORM: ne mesa ka mesa ka lngelunganmu lmngelung mitaku sasing na bubumu klaali bubu mesaku lngelungunsumu riyung.
S.PHON: ne mesa ka mesa ka lŋeluŋanmu lmŋeluŋ mitaku sasiŋ na bubumu klaali bubu mesaku lŋeluŋunsumu ɾijuŋ.
S.FORM: ne mesa ka mesa ka lngelunganmu lmngelung mitaku sasing na bubumu klaali bubu mesaku lngelungunsumu riyung.
S.PHON: ne mesa ka mesa ka lŋeluŋanmu lmŋeluŋ mitaku sasiŋ na bubumu klaali bubu mesaku lŋeluŋunsumu ɾijuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 每當我看著我母親的相片時,我總會在心裡說:「媽媽,我好想念您!」
Whenever I see the pictures of my mother, I would say in my mind: "Mother, I miss you so much!"

S.FORM: nasi uxe isu ga dmayo yaku ge naka so ini so nii knmalu nodaanmu mesaku naq lmngelung.
S.PHON: nasi uxe isu ga dmajo jaku ge naka so ini so nii knmalu nodaanmu mesaku naq lmŋeluŋ.
S.FORM: nasi uxe isu ga dmayo yaku ge naka so ini so nii knmalu nodaanmu mesaku naq lmngelung.
S.PHON: nasi uxe isu ga dmajo jaku ge naka so ini so nii knmalu nodaanmu mesaku naq lmŋeluŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我心裡想著:「若不是您這麼幫助我,我的生活絕不會過得如此的好.」
"If you hadn't helped me, I wouldn't have lived such a good life" I think.

S.FORM: arigato bale bubu mesaku.
S.PHON: aɾigato bale bubu mesaku.
S.FORM: arigato bale bubu mesaku.
S.PHON: aɾigato bale bubu mesaku.
S.TRANSL: 我這麼說:「媽媽,真的謝謝你!」
"Thank you so much, mother," I said.

S.FORM: knuutuxku naq rmengo so sapah ma aniku moda elu.
S.PHON: knuutuxku naq ɾmeŋo so sapaħ ma aniku moda elu.
S.FORM: knuutuxku naq rmengo so sapah ma aniku moda elu.
S.PHON: knuutuxku naq ɾmeŋo so sapaħ ma aniku moda elu.
S.TRANSL: 我也都這樣自個兒在家喃喃自語,即使走在路上也都這樣說.
I'd say so when I am alone at home, and even when I'm walking on the road.

S.FORM: lmngelungku bubumu ge lmingisku.
S.PHON: lmŋeluŋku bubumu ge lmiŋisku.
S.FORM: lmngelungku bubumu ge lmingisku.
S.PHON: lmŋeluŋku bubumu ge lmiŋisku.
S.TRANSL: 我一想到我的母親,我就會哭.
I cry every time I think of my mother.

S.FORM: malusu riyung bubu mesaku.
S.PHON: malusu ɾijuŋ bubu mesaku.
S.FORM: malusu riyung bubu mesaku.
S.PHON: malusu ɾijuŋ bubu mesaku.
S.TRANSL: 我都會說:「媽媽您真得好棒!」
I would say, "Mother, you are so great!"

S.FORM: wadasaku eh posaun kana muuyas posaun kana so yosai mkelaku kana matak lukus kana tminun.
S.PHON: wadasaku eħ posaun kana muujas posaun kana so josai mkelaku kana matak lukus kana tminun.
S.FORM: wadasaku eh posaun kana muuyas posaun kana so yosai mkelaku kana matak lukus kana tminun.
S.PHON: wadasaku eħ posaun kana muujas posaun kana so josai mkelaku kana matak lukus kana tminun.
S.TRANSL: 「您都讓我上學、也都讓我去學洋裁,讓我會剪裁衣服和織布.」
"You had me go to school and learn western dressmaking, so I know how to weave and make clothes."

S.FORM: nasi uxe isu uxeku mpso nii mesaku naq lmngelung kiya ka arigato bale bubumu ha.
S.PHON: nasi uxe isu uxeku mpso nii mesaku naq lmŋeluŋ kija ka aɾigato bale bubumu ħa.
S.FORM: nasi uxe isu uxeku mpso nii mesaku naq lmngelung kiya ka arigato bale bubumu ha.
S.PHON: nasi uxe isu uxeku mpso nii mesaku naq lmŋeluŋ kija ka aɾigato bale bubumu ħa.
S.TRANSL: 「若不是您,我不會像現在這樣.」我是由衷地這麼想.我是真的非常感謝我的母親.
"If it hadn't been you, I would not have become like what I am now" I would say this to myself in my mind. I am truly thankful to my mother.

S.FORM: ano kiya ka karimu saya di.
S.PHON: ano kija ka kaɾimu saja di.
S.FORM: ano kiya ka karimu saya di.
S.PHON: ano kija ka kaɾimu saja di.
S.TRANSL: 所以我今天要說的就這些了.
So these are what I want to say today.

S.FORM: eN arigato bale ka so sense gisu meyah so ah mhuwenamu bale so sense gisu moda so theyaq sapahmu rengoi tikuh nodaansu ah cbeyo mesa ka sense nii mesa ka deheya nii.
S.PHON: en aɾigato bale ka so sense gisu mejaħ so aħ mħuwenamu bale so sense gisu moda so tħejaq sapaħmu ɾeŋoi tikuħ nodaansu aħ ʦbejo mesa ka sense nii mesa ka deħeja nii.
S.FORM: eN arigato bale ka so sense gisu meyah so ah mhuwenamu bale so sense gisu moda so theyaq sapahmu rengoi tikuh nodaansu ah cbeyo mesa ka sense nii mesa ka deheya nii.
S.PHON: en aɾigato bale ka so sense gisu mejaħ so aħ mħuwenamu bale so sense gisu moda so tħejaq sapaħmu ɾeŋoi tikuħ nodaansu aħ ʦbejo mesa ka sense nii mesa ka deħeja nii.
S.TRANSL: 非常感謝老師們,來我家玩,並且對我說:「說一些妳過去的經歷吧!」
I want to thank the professor, who has come here, visited my house and said "Tell us a little bit about your past experience!"

S.FORM: anaq betaq naq hini karimu da.
S.PHON: anaq betaq naq ħini kaɾimu da.
S.FORM: anaq betaq naq hini karimu da.
S.PHON: anaq betaq naq ħini kaɾimu da.
S.TRANSL: 我就說到這裡吧.
I'll just stop here.

S.FORM: mahanamu naq kelaan ka so ah lngelunganmu gisuku rmengo maanu mahanamu naq mkela.
S.PHON: maħanamu naq kelaan ka so aħ lŋeluŋanmu gisuku ɾmeŋo maanu maħanamu naq mkela.
S.FORM: mahanamu naq kelaan ka so ah lngelunganmu gisuku rmengo maanu mahanamu naq mkela.
S.PHON: maħanamu naq kelaan ka so aħ lŋeluŋanmu gisuku ɾmeŋo maanu maħanamu naq mkela.
S.TRANSL: 你們自己會了解我心裡的感受,也會了解我所說的話.
You will understand by yourselves what I think, and what I'm saying now.

S.FORM: ah yo betaq kiya da ha arigato.
S.PHON: aħ jo betaq kija da ħa aɾigato.
S.FORM: ah yo betaq kiya da ha arigato.
S.PHON: aħ jo betaq kija da ħa aɾigato.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣了.謝謝!
That's it. Thank you!
